meta.title: Neurosurgery Practice Software | Surgical Coordination & Post-Op RTM | clinIQ
meta.description: Complete guide to neurosurgery practice operations. Complex case coordination. LOMN generation. Post-operative RTM. OR efficiency optimization.

hero.subhead: Your complex cases need multi-disciplinary coordination. Your surgical authorizations need systematic LOMN generation. Your post-op patients need monitoring. clinIQ coordinates neurosurgical care, generates LOMNs, and captures post-op RTM.

sections.content:
Neurosurgery involves complex, high-acuity cases requiring extensive coordination.

**The coordination complexity:**

Tumor cases need oncology, radiation oncology, neuroradiology coordination. Spine cases need pain management, PT coordination. Complex cases need multidisciplinary planning.

**The authorization burden:**

Craniotomies, complex spine fusions, DBS — all require detailed authorization with extensive documentation.

**What clinIQ does:**

Multidisciplinary tracking: Tumor board, oncology input, radiation planning — status tracked.

Pre-op workup: Advanced imaging, medical clearance, neuro-navigation planning.

Case conference: Complex case discussion documented.

Neurosurgery LOMN requirements are extensive.

**What clinIQ does:**

Procedure templates: Brain tumor, spine fusion, DBS, shunt, etc.

Auto-population: Imaging findings, neurological deficits, conservative care.

Surgeon review: Template populated, surgeon edits and signs.

Time: 5 minutes instead of 45.

Neurosurgery patients have extended recoveries.

**What patients track:**
- Neurological symptoms
- Headache patterns
- Wound healing
- Activity progression
- Medication compliance

**Revenue:**

65 surgical patients × $130/month × 2-3 month recovery = significant RTM revenue.

Neurosurgery cases are long. OR efficiency matters enormously.

**What clinIQ does:**

Case preparation: Imaging loaded, neuro-nav registered, implants confirmed.

Turnover tracking: Time between cases measured.

First case on-time: 7:30 starts at 7:30.

**Week 1-2:** LOMN templates, post-op RTM, case coordination configured.

**ROI:** LOMN time savings. Post-op RTM revenue $100,000+/year. Approval rate improvement.

**Investment:** Professional $499/month. Implementation $750 one-time.

faqs.q: What LOMN templates do you have?
faqs.a: Brain tumor, spine fusion, DBS, shunt, peripheral nerve, and more.
Yes. Symptom monitoring during recovery qualifies for RTM.
